Mapping rows: 1936 (master-to-rebuilt candidates plus rebuilt-only rows; manifest/path/fuzzy linkage).

Interpretation Key (Template Applied)

Name Literal Role Method Class Phase / Layer Problem Answered Governance Function Adjacent Terms Failure if Misunderstood
ai governance constitutionformal containment layergovernance instrumentfirst containment, later revisionHow boundary rules and protocol admissibility are made explicit.Defines admissibility, evidence handling, voice constraints, workflow order.Voice Operator, AIGOV2Method appears improvised rather than governed.
aigovformal containment layergovernance instrumentfirst containment, later revisionHow admissibility and evidence constraints are formalized.Defines admissibility, evidence handling, voice constraints, workflow order.Voice Operator, AIGOV2Method appears improvised rather than governed.
aigov2revised governancerecursive governance revisionsecond-order intensificationHow governance itself gets rewritten by the outputs it governs.Shows governance recursively rewritten by governed outputs.skill distribution, skill-architect, HephaistosArchitecture appears static instead of recursive.
alambickeyordering / amendment / unlocking structureprotocolizationHow ordered access and amendment precedence are controlled.Orders access, precedence, and transformation logic.Sealed Card, Master KeyProtocol logic loses keyed structure.
aurynreciprocal couplingdual recursive operatorthird-orderHow continuity is maintained through relation, not isolated sameness.Explains continuity through coupled reciprocity.Theseus, HopfMethod remains linear instead of coupled.
boobytraplatent triggertrigger conditionfirst-order / stressHow hidden failure is activated under normal traversal conditions.Marks where normal traversal activates hidden failure.Witch's Road, Glitch, MobiusFailure appears accidental rather than structured.
chargepressure before formfoundational signal conditionfirst-orderHow pre-rupture intensity is detected before contradiction is explicit.Marks affective and structural intensity that precedes explicit contradiction.Witch's Road, Glitch, StutterSystem appears to start at rupture, not buildup.
dr sortsorting engineimplementation functionimplementationHow ordering/classification is done under method constraints.Performs ordering and archive handling under method rules.ScriptoriumSorting is treated as administrative not epistemic.
echovoice implementation surfaceapp / method testimplementationHow voice governance behaves under audio/TTS conditions.Tests voice governance translation into audio conditions.Voice OperatorVoice remains abstract rather than operational.
glitchvisible contradictionrupture signalfirst-orderHow mismatches between claim and operation first become observable.Reveals mismatch between claim and operation.Stutter, Boobytrap, RecursoFirst evidence of instability is lost.
govern aiimplementation horizonapp / governance platformlater implementation surfaceHow governance method is operationalized as platform capability.Platformizes governance constraints and recursive method operations.PHAROS, CompassAI, AuroraIPlatform function is mistaken for mere app branding.
governess agathagovernance operatorsupervisory roleoperator layerHow coherence discipline and recursive oversight are maintained.Mediates coherence, discipline, and recursive oversight.Henry, Reviewer #2, Voice OperatorSupervision appears charismatic instead of procedural.
henrypaper builderworkflow operatoroperator layerHow production is channeled toward structured manuscript generation.Channels production toward structured manuscript generation.Reviewer #2, Governess Agatha, Voice OperatorTreated as persona instead of workflow role.
hephaistosforge / build layerfabrication environmentdownstream build / WSL implementationHow revised governance becomes executable across toolchains.Turns revised governance into executable method across Codex and Claude.skill-architect, WSL, distributed skillsTooling looks like implementation-only, not governed fabrication.
hexalaboratoryproduction environmentfirst laboratoriesWhere AI-assisted production pressure is generated for governance response.Experimental site where production generates governance pressure.Wheels of Will, early corpusEarly production is confused with finished method.
hopfbounded linked regimetopological stabilizationthird-orderHow recurrence stabilizes without requiring scalar convergence.Stabilizes linked recurrence without single final scalar answer.Theseus, Auryn, limit does not existNon-convergence appears as collapse.
limit does not existnon-terminal conditionfinal topological statementthird-orderHow non-finality is bounded and governed instead of treated as failure.Declares governed non-final recursive re-entry.HopfMethod appears failed instead of structurally non-final.
lotusimplementation surfaceapp / method testpost-protocol implementationHow method behavior is tested in operational tools.Tests method behavior in implementation surfaces.Scriptorium, ECHO, PHAROSImplementation is detached from method lineage.
master keyexplainer / unlocking logicinterpretive keyprotocolization / explanationHow internally coherent protocol becomes externally legible.Makes protocol readable and usable.Sealed Card, ALAMBICMethod remains coherent but externally opaque.
mobiuslinked reversal pathtopological relationsecond-order to third-order transitionHow one-sided traversal re-enters itself under inversion.Signals where path and reversal collapse into linked recurrence.Boobytrap, Hopf, limit does not existInversion dynamics are flattened into linear sequence.
pharosimplementation horizonapp / governance platformlater implementation surfaceHow governance method moves toward scalable platform form.Carries method toward infrastructural governance platform.CompassAI, AuroraI, Govern-AIMethod remains archival and never infrastructural.
recursorecursive return enginerecursive operatorsecond-orderHow prior outputs return as controlled later inputs.Formalizes re-entry, reuse, and return of prior outputs as later inputs.RECURSUS, Sisyphus, AIGOVRecursion reduced to theme rather than state relation.
recursusbound corpusarchive substratecorpus / method substrateWhat evidentiary body recursive operations are allowed to operate on.Names evidentiary body on which Recurso operates.RecursoCorpus and phase collapse into one another.
reviewer 2critique enginefriction operatoroperator layerHow contestability is introduced as structural review pressure.Injects contestability and review pressure.Henry, Voice OperatorCritique becomes ornamental instead of required.
scriptoriumpaperbuilder environmentimplementation surfacepost-protocol implementationHow writing and sorting workflows are operationalized under method rules.Operationalizes method in writing and sorting workflows.Dr. Sort, HenryWriting support appears generic rather than governance-bearing.
sealed cardthreshold protocollegitimacy protocolend of Phase 1How protocolized legitimacy threshold is crossed for paper-building.Marks first protocolized legitimacy threshold and closure point.Violet Gem, ALAMBIC, Master KeyPhase 1 never properly closes.
sisyphusrepeated unresolved laborrecursive failure formsecond-order / stressHow unresolved recursion is distinguished from productive closure.Names recursion without settlement.Recurso, TheseusEndless revision mistaken for productive recursion.
skill architectmeta-governance of skillsarchitecture filedistribution / meta-governanceHow distributed skill units inherit, route, and constrain each other.Governs relations, inheritance, routing, constraints across skill units.skill.md units, HephaistosDistributed skills become an ungoverned pile.
stutterblocked or repeated passagehesitation signalfirst-orderHow unresolved contradiction manifests as repeated passage failure.Shows where smooth legitimacy breaks down and contradiction persists.Glitch, Charge, BoobytrapRecursive pressure is mistaken for style repetition.
theseuscontinuity under replacementcontinuity constraintthird-orderHow identity continuity is tested across cumulative replacement.Asks what persists through cumulative substitution.Auryn, HopfRevision is treated as identity destruction.
violet gemcarriagetransport / bundling layerprotocolizationHow bounded method packages are carried through protocol transitions.Carries bounded method package through protocol.Sealed Card, ALAMBICMethod packaging looks incidental rather than governed.
voice operatorexecutable voice constraintgovernance operatorfirst containment, later revisionHow friction and contestability are executed in output behavior.Applies friction, contestability, anti-smoothing logic to output.AIGOV, AIGOV2, Henry, Reviewer #2Voice becomes style instead of governance.
voice operator 2revised governancerecursive governance revisionsecond-order intensificationHow voice constraints evolve under recursive pressure.Captures second-order rewrite of voice governance constraints.AIGOV2, Voice Operator, skill-architectVoice constraint layer appears frozen.
wheels of willlaboratory of directed productionproduction environmentfirst laboratoriesHow intent and recursion are intensified in controlled output conditions.Names controlled setting where intent, recursion, and output volume intensify.Hexa, corpus productionTreated as title instead of emergence condition.
witch s roadignition routetraversal conditionepistemic ignition / first-orderHow to traverse uncertainty before protocol hardens.Names constrained passage through uncertainty before full protocol exists.Charge, Glitch, Stutter, BoobytrapRead as atmosphere instead of method path.

Guiding statement: these names are indexed designations for distinct functions within a recursive AI-governance method.
